title: Active Setup Persistence
description: Detects creation of Active Setup entries in the registry for per-user persistence.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Active Setup*' and 'Command Line' like '*StubPath*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate Active Setup entries from software installers

tests.test_name: HKLM - Add atomic_test key to launch executable as part of user setup
HKLM - Add malicious StubPath value to existing Active Setup Entry
HKLM - re-execute 'Internet Explorer Core Fonts' StubPath payload by decreasing version number
